name: web-data-tools
description: Web browsing, extraction, crawling, browser automation, and safe WeChat reader and digest tools.

interface.shortDescription: Firecrawl, Playwright, and WeChat reader and digest tools.
interface.longDescription: Web Data Tools packages Firecrawl MCP for web data extraction, Playwright CLI browser automation, and safe BestBlogs-backed WeChat reader and digest workflows.
defaultPrompt: Extract web data, automate a browser flow, or read and safely digest configured WeChat sources.
